name: 51.25'' Tall LED Lighted Display Cabinet with Tempered Glass Door, Modern Metal Frame Curio Bookshelf for Living Room, Office/Study, Black-ModernLuxe
description:
Showcase your favorite collectibles, books, and décor with this 51.25'' tall LED lighted display cabinet, designed for both functionality and elegance. Featuring a sleek metal frame, tempered glass door, and built-in LED lighting, this modern minimalist curio cabinet enhances the ambiance of any living room, office, or study. The spacious interior shelving provides ample storage for books, artwork, or decorative items, while the black finish adds a sophisticated touch to your space. Constructed from MDF, metal, and durable tempered glass, this cabinet offers stability and long-lasting quality. Whether used as a display case or a stylish bookshelf, this piece seamlessly integrates into modern and contemporary interiors.

Specifications

Material: MDF+Metal+Tempered Glass.
Overall Product Dimension: 35.5''W x 15.75''D x 51.25''H.
Shelf Size: 15.9''W x 14.6''D x 12.2''H.
Overall Product Weight: 111.44 LBS.
Tabletop/Bottom Weight Capacity: 220 LBS.
